ns0:entry.ns0:title: antonbabenko/terraform-best-practices
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antonbabenko/terraform-best-practices
Language: hcl
Terraform Best Practices free ebook translated into 🇬🇧🇦🇪🇧🇦🇧🇷🇫🇷🇬🇪🇩🇪🇬🇷🇮🇱🇮🇳🇮🇩🇮🇹🇯🇵🇰🇷🇵🇱🇷🇴🇨🇳🇪🇸🇹🇷🇺🇦🇵🇰

ns0:entry.ns0:title: techiescamp/devops-projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techiescamp/devops-projects
Language: hcl
DevOps Real World Projects for Aspiring DevOps Engineers [Beginner to Advanced]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-elasticache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-elasticache
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS ElastiCache resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS IAM resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
Language: hcl
Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS S3 resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS VPC resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
Language: hcl
Creates one or more Cloud Storage buckets and assigns basic permissions on them to arbitrary users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-container-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-container-vm
Language: hcl
Deploys containers on Compute Engine instances

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-gcloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-gcloud
Language: hcl
Executes Google Cloud CLI commands within Terraform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
Language: hcl
Allows managing a keyring, zero or more keys in the keyring, and IAM role bindings on individual keys

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-lb-http
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-lb-http
Language: hcl
Creates a global HTTP load balancer for Compute Engine by using forwarding rules

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-pubsub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-pubsub
Language: hcl
Creates Pub/Sub topic and subscriptions associated with the topic
